creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
devel/gvfs is failing to build in poudriere, when DEFAULT_VERSIONS points to samba=4.8.

Compiling the port the classical, FreeBSDish way via make, gives only a waring:

===>>> Launching 'make checksum' for devel/gvfs in background
===>>> Gathering dependency list for devel/gvfs from ports

===>>> The dependency for net/samba47
       seems to be handled by samba48-4.8.0

===>>> Initial dependency check complete for devel/gvfs
